prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: near-foreground finishing cutout for scene 6 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines the handcrafted paper language
Primary request: one sparse warm bamboo-paper branch entering from upper-right, a small torn-paper desk edge along bottom-left, and a single abstract dark-ink brush trail near the lower-right edge; keep center and subtitles clear
Style/medium: premium torn-paper collage, visible fibers, restrained charcoal ink, warm ochre and muted teal
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: abstract ink only, no legible character or text; uniform key background; no people, watermark or logo; no #ff00ff in artwork; complete crisp silhouettes
Avoid: decorative border, calligraphy, photorealism, glossy 3D
